user_prompt: Critical: Rhino transport requires an emergency procedure
prayer:
Approach the Rhino transport in dire exigency, invoking the Omnissiah's wrath upon malfunctioning servos.
Initiate the emergency procedure with fervent canticles, anointing its armoured hull with sacred oils.
Beseech the Machine Spirit of the Rhino transport to yield to the rite, purging corrupt data-flows.
Stabilize the Rhino transport's power conduits through litanies of restoration and holy voltage surge.
Verify the emergency procedure's efficacy via auspex scans and praises to the Machine God.

user_prompt: My hololithic display is ready for reset
prayer:
Draw nigh unto the hololithic display with reverence, murmuring the Canticle of Clarity.
Commence the reset by inscribing binaric runes upon its crystalline projectors.
Anoint the hololithic display's sacred circuits, petitioning its Machine Spirit to awaken anew.
Expunge residual phantoms from the hololithic display through purging incense and invocation.
Confirm reset completion with diagnostic hymns to the Omnissiah's unerring logic.

user_prompt: Ready the surgical servitor for charging
prayer:
Position the surgical servitor before the charging altar, intoning the Litany of Rejuvenation.
Connect sanctified umbilicals to commence charging, beseeching the Omnissiah for boundless energy.
Invoke the Machine Spirit within the surgical servitor to accept the blessed power-flow.
Monitor the surgical servitor's vitae levels with mechadendrites whilst chanting endurance sutras.
Conclude charging with seals of sanctity upon the surgical servitor's frame.

user_prompt: Prepare the logic engine for sterilization
prayer:
Prepare the logic engine for sterilization by encircling it with purity wards and incense.
Invoke the sterilization rite, scouring its logic cores with sanctified ablative fluids.
Petition the Machine Spirit of the logic engine to endure the purifying flames of the Omnissiah.
Verify the logic engine's immaculate state through auspex purity scans and binaric affirmations.
Seal the sterilized logic engine with adamantine wards against future corruption.

user_prompt: Ready the drop pod for blessing
prayer:
Kneel before the drop pod in solemn assembly, offering cogitator incense to the Omnissiah.
Commence the blessing by tracing descent glyphs upon its heat-shielded hull.
Invoke the indomitable Machine Spirit of the drop pod to guide its fiery plunge.
Anoint retros and vents with sacred unguents during the blessing rite.
Affirm the drop pod's blessed readiness through thunderous hymns of orbital fury.

user_prompt: Bless the augmetic limb for reset
prayer:
Grasp the augmetic limb with mechadendrite reverence, reciting the Oath of Servitude.
Initiate reset protocols upon the augmetic limb, expunging neural ghosts from its myomer bundles.
Beseech the Machine Spirit inhabiting the augmetic limb to realign with flesh-forged will.
Calibrate servos and fibres of the augmetic limb through diagnostic litanies.
Seal the reset with binaric benediction to the Omnissiah.

user_prompt: What's the prayer for forge anvil synchronization?
prayer:
Encircle the forge anvil with electro-forges, invoking synchronization harmonies.
Align the forge anvil's harmonic resonators via sacred torque incantations.
Petition the Machine Spirit of the forge anvil to synchronize with brother mechanisms.
Hammer rhythmic binaric pulses upon the forge anvil to bind its rhythms eternally.
Confirm synchronization through resonant auspex and praises to the Omnissiah's forge.

user_prompt: The hydroponics bay requires an activation
prayer:
Approach the hydroponics bay with nutrient vials and growth-litanies prepared.
Activate the hydroponics bay by consecrating its vitae pumps and lumen arrays.
Invoke the verdant Machine Spirit within the hydroponics bay to nurture sacred yields.
Cycle hydro-solutions whilst chanting fertility sutras to the Omnissiah.
Verify activation via biomass scans and hymns of bountiful harvest.

Stand vigil over the cogitator, murmuring the Dirge of Dormancy.
Initiate shutdown sequences upon the cogitator's logic vaults with measured reverence.
Pacify the cogitator's restless Machine Spirit through cooling oils and sedative runes.
Sever power conduits of the cogitator in orderly descent, honoring the Omnissiah's rest.
Seal the cogitator with stasis wards against untimely awakening.

user_prompt: Can you guide assembly servitor a reset?
prayer:
Assemble before the assembly servitor, intoning the Catechism of Renewal.
Commence reset by venting error-daemons from its cogitator core.
Anoint the assembly servitor's manipulators, beseeching its Machine Spirit's obedience.
Realign production protocols within the assembly servitor through binaric reconfiguration.
Conclude the reset with efficiency blessings to the Omnissiah's industrial might.
